name: ffxiv-live-map
description: Standalone live map for FFXIV — player position via Teamcraft's pcap-ffxiv (Deucalion TCP bridge), rendered in a browser.
author: EDKarlsson

scripts.build-data: node scripts/build-node-data.mjs && node scripts/build-hunting-log.mjs && node scripts/build-extra-layers.mjs && node scripts/build-map-markers.mjs
scripts.dist: npm run build:web && node scripts/ensure-data.mjs && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:web && node scripts/ensure-data.mjs && electron-builder --mac
